nasb.text: My people, remember now What Balak king of Moab counseled And what Balaam son of Beor answered him, And from Shittim to Gilgal, So that you might know the righteous acts of the Lord.”

esv.text: O my people, remember what Balak king of Moab devised, and what Balaam the son of Beor answered him, and what happened from Shittim to Gilgal, that you may know the righteous acts of the Lord.”

cnv.text: 我的民哪！你們要追念， 摩押王巴勒圖謀過甚麼， 比珥的兒子巴蘭又答應了他甚麼， 以及你們從什亭到吉甲所發生的事， 好使你們知道耶和華公義的作為。”

ccb.text: 我的子民啊， 你们要回想摩押王巴勒的阴谋以及比珥之子巴兰给他的回答， 要回想你们从什亭到吉甲途中的遭遇， 以便认识耶和华公义的作为。”
